base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of level_4_d_second_quest — a tile (level_layout) from 1986 legend of zelda. Second Quest Level 4 'D' — remix (spells 'ELDA' with 1/2/3/4/5 = E/L/D/A/Z = ZELDA). Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Second Quest Level 4 'D' — remix (spells 'ELDA' with 1/2/3/4/5 = E/L/D/A/Z = ZELDA)
